page: Microsoft Azure E160ads_v7 is an x86_64 architecture server powered by dedicated AMD EPYC 9V45 processors running at 4.5 GHz. It features 160 vCPUs across 80 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled. The memory configuration includes 1280.0 GB of RAM, establishing an 8.0 GB per core ratio. Storage is provided via 9449 GB of local disk space, and the instance is Premium Storage capable.

Benchmark data places this server in the top tier for both single-core and multi-core CPU performance via stress-ng, as well as PassMark CPU and memory metrics. Memory bandwidth is highly efficient, reaching 14497.71 GB/sec for cached small blocks and 462.59 GB/sec for uncached large blocks. The system also demonstrates top-tier capabilities in database operations, with Redis SET operations reaching 202.43 million operations per second, and static web serving throughput of 109.88 GB/sec.

Given the high density of memory and local storage, this server offers resource density suitable for large-scale enterprise deployments. The lack of a GPU limits its utility for heavy deep learning training, though it achieves top-tier CPU-based LLM inference speeds for medium-sized models. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent performance without resource contention, making it a stable choice for predictable workloads.
This server is designed for memory-intensive workloads, large-scale relational databases, in-memory caching systems like Redis, data analytics, and high-throughput web serving.
description: Microsoft Azure E160ads_v7 is a memory-optimized server featuring 160 vCPUs and 1280.0 GB of RAM, powered by dedicated AMD EPYC 9V45 processors running at 4.5 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture under Microsoft Hyper-V, it includes 9449 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage. The server delivers top-tier performance across CPU, memory bandwidth, and database benchmarks, achieving 202.43 million Redis SET operations per second and 109.88 GB/sec in static web serving. Lacking a dedicated GPU, it relies on its high-frequency AMD cores for processing, making it highly efficient for memory-intensive enterprise applications. This hardware profile is best suited for large-scale databases, in-memory data stores, data warehousing, and high-throughput web serving workloads.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E160ads_v7 is a memory-optimized server featuring 160 vCPUs, 1280 GB RAM, and 9449 GB of local storage, delivering top-tier database and memory bandwidth performance for enterprise workloads.

tagline: A high-capacity memory-optimized platform featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors and extensive local storage for demanding database workloads.

1280.0 GB of RAM providing an 8.0 GB per core memory-to-CPU ratio
9449 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Top-tier memory bandwidth and database performance benchmarks
Optimized for large-scale databases, in-memory caching, and data analytics
